falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 3% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal and suggest the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 150% of the 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a confirmed breakout or reversal, contradicting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict and suggesting a clear directional move.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would confirm a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the pattern's similarity to a historical bottom and invalidating the current HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
